problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
